personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | AI Data Platform & Pipeline Specialist

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience and strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark, ETL pipeline design, data quality, telemetry analytics, and governed data platforms. Built production-scale pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, supported AWS data platforms using S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock, and developed AI-enabled data workflows including RAG-style vector retrieval and agentic job-search automation. Brings practical experience in pipeline monitoring, performance optimization, access controls, encryption, compliance-minded data governance, and executive analytics.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing manual processes with governed, repeatable data workflows for enterprise capacity analytics.
Built hybrid AWS and Oracle data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift workloads, and optimized Oracle schemas to support forecasting, reporting, and historical retention.
Implemented data quality, cleansing, validation, and reconciliation practices across telemetry pipelines to improve trust in executive dashboards and capacity planning outputs.
Developed ML forecasting pipelines with Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks six months ahead, improving provisioning lead time and infrastructure risk visibility.
Instrumented operational data flows with monitoring, alerting, dashboards, and performance analysis using BMC TrueSight, CA APM, AppDynamics, Python automation, and reporting layers.
Supported secure, compliance-aware data operations in a regulated banking environment, including access management, data governance, retention, and sensitive financial data handling.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Gomez Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, supporting reliability and performance visibility for revenue-facing applications.
Led the FAST project by data-mining real-user and synthetic performance telemetry to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero production monitoring regression during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace to correlate load testing results with application telemetry, transaction traces, and infrastructure behavior.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for TIAA-CREF, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise monitoring environments.
Designed dashboards, alerts, thresholds, and SLA monitoring modules that became reusable operational standards across client environments.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate performance reporting and reduce manual weekly export effort.
Partnered with J2EE and WebLogic teams to diagnose production bottlenecks using application telemetry, thread behavior, and monitoring data.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom web applications under load to identify throughput limits, JDBC connection pressure, thread bottlenecks, heap behavior, CPU saturation, and GC patterns.
Installed and configured JMX monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation scripts to improve visibility during performance test cycles.
Documented performance baselines and regression thresholds used by engineering teams for release gate decisions.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster handling transaction volume described as 10x VISA scale.
Optimized transaction processing with C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI testing framework to validate data migration correctness across millions of transaction records.
Automated schema conversion and data validation pipelines to protect data integrity during phased migration cutover.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE mainframe modernization program.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 messaging interfaces aligned to government system architecture standards.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutex locks, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs for telecom billing operations.
Delivered C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL performance improvements that reduced memory usage 75%, improved throughput 20%, and achieved 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Maintained and enhanced AMDOCS billing, invoicing, settlement, EDI, reporting, and interface modules across full production support lifecycle.
Automated WebLogic and WebSphere administration with Korn Shell scripting, reducing manual deployment effort and improving operational consistency.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Data Engineering: Python, SQL, PySpark, Apache Spark, ETL/ELT, data pipelines, data modeling, schema design, data quality, validation, reconciliation, indexing concepts, structured and semi-structured data processing
skills.Cloud & Platforms: AWS Glue, S3, Athena, Redshift, Bedrock, EC2, ECS, Azure data services familiarity, Databricks learning, Delta Lake learning, Unity Catalog learning, Snowflake learning
skills.AI & Retrieval: RAG-style retrieval, vector embeddings, FAISS, sentence-transformers, agentic AI workflows, GenAI integrations, Text-to-SQL agents, ML forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn
skills.Governance & Security: Data governance, access controls, compliance-minded data handling, encryption, retention policies, sensitive financial data controls, audit-aware operations
skills.Observability & Operations: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, Dynatrace AppMon, Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, monitoring, alerting, dashboards, telemetry analysis, performance tuning, incident response support
skills.DevOps & Delivery: Docker, Git, Airflow, CI/CD pipeline design, GitHub Actions, Linux/Unix, Korn Shell, Perl, pytest

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline that uses semantic duplicate detection, LLM-powered job scoring, resume tailoring, cover letter generation, quality gates, and application tracking. The system uses FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers for retrieval-style matching across job postings and Grok API calls for structured pipeline steps.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark patterns to support governed enterprise data access, AI consumption, and Text-to-SQL GenAI workflows. Addressed small-file and columnar storage patterns with Parquet and Snappy concepts.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit to reduce manual forecasting cycles and surface capacity risks through interactive analytics.
